accessibility.text: The Impact of Blur on Motion Parallax and Binocular Disparity
The Impact of Blur on Motion Parallax and Binocular Disparity
motion parallax is overall less sensitive than binocular disparity
The Impact of Blur on Motion Parallax and Binocular Disparity
The Impact of Blur on Motion Parallax and Binocular Disparity
motion parallax is overall less sensitive than binocular disparity
depth from motion parallax is immediately affected by visible blur
depth from binocular disparity is resilient to strong blur
